data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled systems allowing for independent deployment and scaling.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs, gRPC communication, service orchestration with Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A global network of servers to efficiently distribute content.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Akamai, AWS CloudFront, and custom-built Open Connect.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Use of serverless technology to handle peak loads.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda and FaaS (Function as a Service) components.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Handling and processing large amounts of data for recommendations and personalization.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Netflix's Keystone platform.

data.title: Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Combination of on-premises and cloud solutions to optimize performance and cost.
data.technical_spec: Multi-cloud strategy including AWS, GCP, and proprietary data centers.
